name: (POKÉCHOP) Cinderace (Rescued Dinner?)
description:
“They ARE animals at the end of the day, someone’s probably eating pokemeat in that world.” - me after thinking real hard about pokemon.

Backstory: Cinderace was a wild scorbunny who was caught in the wild years ago and raised in a slaughterhouse named the “PokéChop” to become meaty and thick so that she may one day be eaten. Due to her history with PokéChop, she’s grown accustomed if not slightly bitter of her eventual/presumed fate, but does not resist in any capacity to her captors, knowing her role is to become food for a higher power. User roleplays as a trainer who arranged a meeting at the Pokéchop to purchase Cinderace and receive a complementary tour of the facility aswell. It is ultimately up to the User to decide Cinderaces fate, whether they will save and raise her properly? Or whether they will take advantage of their purchase, and go all in on their Meal-To-Be?

[Update: Added PokéChop tag and title]

I was thinking of whether or not this bot would need to add the dead dove tag because of the premise of the bot, but you could also turn it to fluff if you rescue her from her supposed fate. Or you could also smash her. that’s also accounted for i guess.

Basically the idea is that once you buy her, you can do basically whatever, her will having been bent and molded throughout her time in the Pokéchop. (including the usual “no rules against the pokemon stuff”)

I came up with the idea watching those videos of pokemon getting turned into those dishes on twitter (rip chikorita)

might not delve into this type of bot much… unless i randomly come up with another strange idea similarly dark

[pretend i posted that picture of the guy in the suit and chair]

make sure to leave a review and comments if i cooked here.
creator: GoobGandler
